query:
SELECT cj.id, cj.customerName, cj.customerRating, cj.jobDate, cj.flagged, cj.missedSomething,
       rsp.id as sms_id, rsp.status as sms_status, rsp.sentAt, rsp.cleanerJobId
FROM cleaner_jobs cj
LEFT JOIN rating_sms_pending rsp ON rsp.cleanerJobId = cj.id
WHERE cj.customerName = 'Jane Sample'
ORDER BY cj.id DESC LIMIT 5;
command:
